title: Splatoon 2 Styled UI
description: The pack that changes the Default MC UI to the theme of Splatoon 2's UI
body:
The pack that changes the Default MC UI to the theme of Splatoon 2's UI

- Inventory vaguely resembles the equip screen
- The Creative menu and Book resembles the Grizzco manual
- The Enchanting Table font changes to the Square Script Font
- HP references the Splatoon teammate UI
- Hunger bar references the Seanwich
- Attack cooldown icon changes from the Sword to the Splatana Wiper
etc.
